name: Health Coverage Tax Credit (HCTC)

eligibility.description: Applies to 'eligible individuals' which include TAA (Trade Adjustment Assistance) recipients, Alternative TAA recipients, and PBGC (Pension Benefit Guaranty Corporation) pension recipients aged 55 or older. Note: While the statute text shows a 2022 expiration, taxpayers should monitor for legislative extensions as this credit is frequently extended retroactively.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A refundable tax credit covering 72.5% of the premiums paid for qualified health insurance for eligible individuals and their family members.
